query:
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, c.externalId, c.name, c.customerType
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Booroodabin%' 
   OR c.name LIKE '%Boyd Legal%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%WRM Water%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%HKS Financial%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Roberts Roofing%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Acumen Building%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Stony Creek%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Reezo%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Froyay%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Fritzenberger%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Haig St%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Holy Shot%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Two Yolks%'
ORDER BY c.name
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT bi.description, bi.lineAmount, c.externalId, c.name, c.customerType
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Booroodabin%' 
   OR c.name LIKE '%Boyd Legal%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%WRM Water%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%HKS Financial%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Roberts Roofing%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Acumen Building%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Stony Creek%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Reezo%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Froyay%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Fritzenberger%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Haig St%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Holy Shot%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Two Yolks%'
ORDER BY c.name
